mapper.sql: id, disabled, perm_ver, username, password, email, nickname, avatar, title, additional_info, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
from user_account where username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and disabled = false

select
from user_account where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and disabled = false
mapper.insert:
insert into user_account
id,
disabled,
perm_ver,
username,
password,
email,
nickname,
avatar,
title,
additional_info,
created_at,
updated_at,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{permVer,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{additionalInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_account
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
perm_ver = #{permVer,jdbcType=INTEGER},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
additional_info = #{additionalInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user_account set disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, perm_ver = #{permVer,jdbcType=INTEGER}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, additional_info = #{additionalInfo,jdbcType=OTHER}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
